compliance_note: ships only when the EOI phase is active; re-clear against live conditions. Non-binding expression of interest only. No payment, no commitment, no allocation, no priority, no minimum. Verbatim CSF warning retained. Re-run the full compliance battery against live offer conditions before this phase goes live.
angle: Birchal Next / vision (EOI: indicate interest in the next chapter)
hook_type: Cadence numbers + 'a new chapter we want your read on' curiosity (interest-only frame)
tactic: Proof cadence -> forward-looking chapter -> non-binding interest ask
primary_text:
324 raises, $234M+, and a new chapter we want your read on.

We built the platform Australians used to back Naked Life and Our Cow. From mid 2026 we are modernising it: better analytics, smoother onboarding, faster from prep to settlement. We call it Birchal Next.

If our own raise interests you, tell us. It is a non-binding expression of interest. No payment, no commitment, and you decide nothing until you read the offer document.

Indicate your interest. We will tell you the moment the offer goes live.

*Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
headline: Tell us if Birchal Next interests you
description: Non-binding. No payment, no commitment. Indicate your interest.
_source_label: DRC V5 -- E1 Birchal Next / Vision (EOI, first-timers, phase-gated)
_iterates: BIRCHAL-V5-W2 vision angle, re-framed for the EOI phase regime (interest-only, non-binding).
_v5_rationale: Client supplied EOI examples that breach CSF (priority/allocation/reserve/'first in line'). This rewrites the vision angle to interest-only: 'a non-binding expression of interest. No payment, no commitment'. No allocation, no priority, no minimum, no preferential terms.
Hook Halbert 5/5 in --primary-text mode (cadence + 'a new chapter we want your read on' curiosity). The EOI regime does not force a softer hook here; the numbers cadence still carries it.
BIRCHAL-NEXT used forward-looking only ('from mid 2026 we are modernising'); no present-state capability claim; no 'backed by X and Y'.
Verbatim CSF warning retained byte-exact (still required while pre-offer-document).
_drc_audience: B2C considered, solution-aware. First-time CSF investors, EOI phase.
_a_pile_signals: curiosity gap (a new chapter we want your read on)
_compliance_findings_resolved: EOI regime: 'non-binding expression of interest', 'no payment, no commitment', 'indicate your interest'. Allowed EOI language only.

STILL HARD-BLOCK clear: no 'first in line', no priority access/allocation, no 'secure/reserve your allocation/place/spot in the raise', no 'shares allocated to early registrants', no '$X / from $X' minimum, no 'same terms as institutional/insiders', no 'be first in the queue'. Zero matches.
BANNED-CSF-PHRASES (waitlist set, still applies): zero matches. No 'invest/buy/subscribe now'.
VERBATIM-OFFER-LANGUAGE: 'we will tell you the moment the offer goes live'. No 'we will send'.
VERBATIM-CSF-WARNING: byte-exact final line, appears exactly once.
BRAND-EXCLUDED: only verified-good raises (Naked Life RAISE-001, Our Cow RAISE-002).
BIRCHAL-NEXT forward-looking only; no 'backed by X and Y'; banned AI-tells from the verbatim positioning not used in ad prose.
Subject discipline: 'Birchal' appears once ('Birchal Next'); first-person we/our elsewhere.
